sources.title: The Cold War: The Berlin Wall (Grade 12)
Grade 12 - The impact of the Cold War in forming the world as it was in the 1960s
Grade 12 - The end of the Cold War and a new global world order, 1989 to present
Timeline: The end of the Cold War and a new world order

slides.heading: IMpi Yomqando
slides.lead: Indlela izikhulu ezimbili zamandla (superpowers) ezahlukanisa ngayo umhlaba waba amaqembu aphikisanayo futhi zabumba ezombusazwe zomhlaba cishe isigamu sekhulu leminyaka, zingalwi ngokuqondile.

image.alt: Umhlaba wonke (globe) ohlukaniswe phakathi waba yizingxenye ezimbili, enye ebomvu enye eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, ofanekisela umhlaba ohlukaniswe phakathi kwezikhulu ezimbili zamandla.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><clipPath id='g'><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='68'/></clipPath><g clip-path='url(#g)'><rect x='92' y='22' width='68' height='136' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='160' y='22' width='68' height='136' fill='#2f4b7a'/></g><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='68' fill='none' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='158' y='22' width='4' height='136' fill='#f4efe6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Qala ngokucacisa ukuphambana kwegama: 'impi' eyayivame ukuba *yomqando* - eyayilwa ngenkolelo-mbono, inkulumo-ze (propaganda), ubunhloli, umqhudelwano wezikhali kanye nezingxabano ezenziwa ngabanye (proxy) esikhundleni sempi eqondile phakathi kwe-USA ne-USSR. Beka isikhathi: cishe kusukela ku-1945 kuya ku-1991. Buza abafundi ukuthi kungani abangane bempi bangaphambili baba yizitha - umbuzo oqhuba lesi sifundo.

slides.heading: Yayiyini iMpi Yomqando?
slides.lead: Isimo eside sokuvuthelana kwezombusazwe nezempi phakathi kwe-United States ne-Soviet Union kanye nabangane bazo.

blocks.text: IMpi Yomqando kwakuwumqhudelwano womhlaba wonke phakathi **kwezikhulu ezimbili zamandla (superpowers)** - i-**United States (USA)** yekhaphithalizimu kanye ne-**Soviet Union (USSR)** yobukhomanisi - kusukela ekupheleni kweMpi Yezwe Yesibili ngo-1945 kwaze kwaba yikuwohloka kwe-USSR ngo-1991. Yayi 'yomqando' ngoba lezi zombili azizange zilwe ngokuqondile; impi esobala phakathi kwazo yayivinjelwa yizikhali zenuzi.

items: **Uhlelo lwezinhlangothi ezimbili (bipolar order)**: iningi lezizwe lazihlanganisa nelinye lamaqembu amabili amandla.
Ingxabano yenzeka ngenkolelo-mbono, ezomnotho, inkulumo-ze (propaganda), ubunhloli kanye nomqhudelwano wezikhali.
Yalwa 'ezimpini ezenziwa ngabanye (proxy wars)' - izingxabano kwamanye amazwe ezazisekelwa yizikhulu zamandla.

slides.notes: Chaza amagama abalulekile abafundi abawadingayo kuyo yonke le yunithi: isikhulu samandla (superpower), izinhlangothi ezimbili (bipolar), ikhaphithalizimu (capitalism), ubukhomanisi (communism), impi eyenziwa ngabanye (proxy war), umqhudelwano wezikhali (arms race), ukuvimbela ngokwesabisa (deterrence). Gcizelela ukuthi 'bipolar' isho izinhlangothi ezimbili noma izikhungo ezimbili zamandla. Chaza ukuthi ukwesaba ukubhubhisana ngenuzi yikho okwagcina impi 'iyomqando' - indikimba ephindwa kumaslayidi omqhudelwano wezikhali neCuba.

slides.heading: Kusukela kubangane kuya ezitheni
slides.lead: I-USA ne-USSR zahlula iNazi Germany ndawonye, zabe sezixabana ngendlela yokwakha kabusha umhlaba ngemva kwempi.

blocks.text: Phakathi neMpi Yezwe Yesibili i-USA, iBrithani kanye ne-USSR kwakungabangane abalwa noHitler. Njengoba ukunqoba kwakusondela, abaholi bazo bahlangana e-**Yalta (Februwari 1945)** nase-**Potsdam (Julayi-Agasti 1945)** ukuze bahlele ukuthula - kodwa kwavela ukungezwani okukhulu ngekusasa leYurophu YaseMpumalanga, ikakhulukazi iPoland neJalimane elalihluliwe.

items: I-USA yayifuna ukhetho olukhululekile nezimakethe ezivulekile kulo lonke iYurophu.
I-USSR, eyayihlaselwe kabili yiJalimane, yayifuna amazwe angabangane awuvikelo emingceleni yayo.
Ukusolana kwajula: i-USSR yayingalithembi ibhomu le-athomu lase-US; i-USA yayingakuthembi ukwanda kwe-Soviet.

image.alt: Izandla ezimbili ezake zaxhawulana manje sezidonsana ziqhelelana, kunesikhala esiklebhukile esivuleka phakathi kwazo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='72' width='70' height='16' rx='8' fill='#2f4b7a'/><rect x='140' y='72' width='70' height='16' rx='8' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M118 40 L126 70 L114 82 L124 96 L116 120' fill='none' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='4' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuthi izazi-mlando ziyaphikisana ngokuthi ubani 'onecala' ngeMpi Yomqando (izikole ezijwayelekile, ezibuyekezayo nezangemva kokubuyekeza). Khuthaza abafundi ukuba bakubone njengokushayisana kwezidingo KANYE nezinkolelo-mbono, hhayi umenzi wobubi oyedwa. Gqamisa inkinga yokuphepha (security dilemma): izinyathelo zokuzivikela zohlangothi ngalunye zazibukeka zihlasela kolunye. [SME] Qinisekisa ukujula kwemininingwane elindelekile empikiswaneni yezazi-mlando kuhlolo lwakho lwe-CAPS oluqondile.

slides.heading: Izindlela ezimbili zokuhlela umphakathi
slides.lead: Enhliziyweni yayo iMpi Yomqando kwakuwumqhudelwano phakathi kwemibono emibili ephikisanayo yezombusazwe nezomnotho.

blocks.heading: Ikhaphithalizimu (USA)
blocks.text: Ubunikazi bomuntu siqu, izimakethe ezikhululekile, intando yeningi yamaqembu amaningi kanye nenkululeko yomuntu ngamunye.

blocks.heading: Ubukhomanisi (USSR)
blocks.text: Ubunikazi bukahulumeni, umnotho ohleliwe, ukubusa kweqembu elilodwa kanye nezinjongo zomphakathi ngaphezu kokukhetha komuntu ngamunye.

blocks.heading: Ngalinye lazisho liyikusasa
blocks.text: Womabili amaqembu akhuthaza uhlelo lwawo njengoludlulele futhi azama ukuheha izizwe ezisanda kuzuza inkululeko zase-Afrika nase-Asia.

slides.notes: Gcina ukuqhathanisa kulinganisele futhi kunokuhlaziya: chaza uhlelo ngalunye ngendlela yalo esikhundleni sokwenza ubugxova ngalunye. Qaphela ukuthi empeleni womabili amaqembu ehluleka ukufinyelela izimiso zawo - i-USA yeseka eminye imibuso engenayo intando yeningi, futhi i-USSR yayicindezela. Lo mehluko obucayi ubalulekile ekhonweni lezinga le-FET lokuhlola ukuchema nokwethembeka emithonjeni.

slides.heading: Ukuvimba ukwanda (Containment): iTruman Doctrine neMarshall Plan
slides.lead: I-USA yazibophezela ekumiseni ukwanda kobukhomanisi ngaphandle kwalapho babuvele bukhona.

blocks.text: NgoMashi 1947 uMongameli **Harry Truman** wathembisa ukwesekwa kwe-US 'kwabantu abakhululekile' abamelana nobukhomanisi - inqubomgomo **yokuvimba ukwanda (containment)**. Ngo-1948 kwalandela i-**Marshall Plan**, eyanikela ngezigidigidi zamadola ukuze kwakhiwe kabusha iYurophu YaseNtshonalanga eyayilinyazwe yimpi, ukuze kudedwe usizi futhi ubukhomanisi bungabi buhle kangako.

items: I-USSR yayibona i-Marshall Plan 'njengobukoloni bedola' base-US futhi yenqabela amazwe eqembu laseMpumalanga ukuba ajoyine.
Izivumelwano zezempi zaqinisa ukwehlukana: i-**NATO** (yaseNtshonalanga, 1949) kanye ne-**Warsaw Pact** (yaseMpumalanga, 1955).
IYurophu manje yayihlukaniswe yaba amaqembu amabili aphikisanayo, ahlomile.

image.alt: Ihawu elinophawu lwedola limile phakathi kwemicibisholo esunduza ingena ivela ngakwesokudla.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M70 30 L120 30 L120 90 Q120 120 95 132 Q70 120 70 90 Z' fill='#2f4b7a'/><text x='95' y='90' font-size='42' fill='#f4efe6' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>$</text><g fill='#8a1f1f'><path d='M210 60 L170 60 L170 50 L150 70 L170 90 L170 80 L210 80 Z'/><path d='M210 100 L170 100 L170 90 L150 110 L170 130 L170 120 L210 120 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Veza imbangela nomphumela: ukuvimba ukwanda (containment) ne-Marshall Plan kwakuyizimpendulo ze-US ekwandeni okwakubonwa kwe-Soviet, futhi kwakhuthaza izinyathelo zokuphikisa zeSoviet (iCominform, kamuva iWarsaw Pact). Lo mfutho wesenzo-nempendulo uyinjini yeMpi Yomqando yasekuqaleni. Qaphela izisusa ezixubile ze-Marshall Plan - usizo lobuntu kanye nenzuzo yamasu.

slides.heading: IKhethini Lensimbi (Iron Curtain)
slides.lead: IYurophu yayihlukaniswe phakathi kweMpumalanga elawulwa yiSoviet neNtshonalanga eyayihlangene ne-US.

blocks.text: Kusukela eStettin eBaltic kuya eTrieste e-Adriatic, ikhethini lensimbi lehlile lawela kulo lonke iZwekazi.

Amazwi kaChurchill athwebula isimo esisha: i-USSR yamisa **ohulumeni bobukhomanisi** abangabangane kulo lonke iYurophu YaseMpumalanga - iPoland, iHungary, iCzechoslovakia, iJalimane laseMpumalanga nabanye - yakha iqembu **lamazwe ayizisebenzi (satellite states)**. IJalimane ngokwalo lalihlukaniswe laba yiNtshonalanga enentando yeningi neMpumalanga yobukhomanisi.

items: 'Ikhethini' laliyingxenye yenkolelo-mbono, yezombusazwe futhi ekugcineni laba ngokwenyama.
Ukuhamba nolwazi kwakulawulwa ngokuqinile phakathi kwezingxenye ezimbili zeYurophu.
IBerlin, eshumekeke ngaphakathi eJalimane laseMpumalanga, yaba yindawo eyingozi kunazo zonke yeMpi Yomqando.

slides.notes: Chaza ukuthi uChurchill wayengubani nokuthi le nkulumo ingumthombo wokuqala odumile - obalulekile emsebenzini wokuhlaziya umthombo mayelana nethoni, inhloso nezilaleli. Lungiselela islayidi esilandelayo ngokugcizelela isikhundla esingavamile seBerlin: idolobha elihlukaniswe laba yizingxenye zaseNtshonalanga nezeSoviet, kodwa elitholakala liphelele ngaphakathi eJalimane laseMpumalanga lobukhomanisi, okulenza libe yindawo yengcindezi.

slides.heading: IBerlin: ukuvinjezelwa, ukuthuthwa ngezindiza nodonga
slides.lead: IBerlin ehlukanisiwe yaba ngumugqa waphambili lapho ukuvuthelana kweMpi Yomqando kwakusongela njalonjalo ukubila kwephuphume.

blocks.text: NgoJuni 1948 i-USSR **yavimbezela** iBerlin YaseNtshonalanga, yanquma imigwaqo nemizila kaloliwe ukuze iphoqe amandla aseNtshonalanga ukuba aphume. INtshonalanga yaphendula nge-**Berlin Airlift**, indiza ingenisa ukudla namafutha cishe unyaka wonke kwaze kwaba yilapho amaSoviet ehla ngoMeyi 1949. Ngo-Agasti 1961 iJalimane laseMpumalanga lakha u-**Donga LwaseBerlin (Berlin Wall)** ukuvimba izakhamuzi zalo ukuba zibalekele eNtshonalanga.

items: I-airlift yaba uphawu lokuzimisela kweNtshonalanga; abashayeli bezindiza abavela emazweni amaningana, kubandakanya iNingizimu Afrika, babamba iqhaza.
Udonga lwahlukanisa imindeni ngokoqobo futhi lwaba yisithombe esihlala njalo somhlaba ohlukanisiwe.
Ukuwa kwalo ngoNovemba 1989 kamuva kwabika ukuphela kweMpi Yomqando.

image.alt: Indiza yempahla indiza ngaphezu kodonga oluphakeme oluhlukanisa izingxenye ezimbili zedolobha.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#cfe0ec'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='112' y='58' width='16' height='62' fill='#6b6b6b'/><rect x='108' y='52' width='24' height='8' fill='#4d4d4d'/><g fill='#2f4b7a'><path d='M40 44 L96 52 L96 62 L44 60 Z'/><path d='M56 40 L70 46 L62 52 Z'/><rect x='90' y='50' width='16' height='4'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='30' y='96' width='26' height='24'/><rect x='170' y='96' width='26' height='24'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Sebenzisa iBerlin ukwenza ingxabano engabambekiyo ibambeke ngezikhathi ezintathu: ukuvinjezelwa (1948-49), uDonga (1961), ukuwa (1989). Qaphela ukubika kwe-SAHO ngabashayeli bezindiza baseNingizimu Afrika e-Berlin Airlift njengephuzu loxhumano lwendawo (bheka imithombo). Gcizelela izindleko zabantu zoDonga. Lesi slayidi ngamabomu sivala impi yonke yeMpi Yomqando, abafundi abazoyifunda kuze kube sekupheleni kwayo eSihlokweni 6.

slides.heading: Izikhathi ezibalulekile zeMpi Yomqando

blocks.alt: Uhlelo lwezikhathi lwezehlakalo zeMpi Yomqando kusukela ku-1945 kuya ku-1991.

events.label: Izingqungquthela zaseYalta nasePotsdam; ubungane bempi buyaphela
IMpi YaseKorea - impi enkulu yokuqala eyenziwa ngabanye (proxy)
UDonga LwaseBerlin luyawa; i-USSR iyawohloka; iMpi Yomqando iyaphela

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lesi slayidi ukuqinisa uhlelo lwezikhathi ngaphambi kokuya emqhudelwaneni wezikhali zenuzi nasezinkingeni. Cela abafundi ukuba bahlonze iphethini yokukhula nokudamba (ukuvuthelana, inkinga, ukudamba okwesikhashana, ukuvuthelana okusha). Veza isikhathi eside - amashumi amane eminyaka ngaphezulu - ukuze baqonde ukuthi iMpi Yomqando yabumba yonke impilo yesizukulwane sabokhokho babo.

slides.heading: Izikhali zenuzi nokulingana kokwesabisa
slides.lead: Isikhulu samandla ngasinye sakha izikhali ezanele ukubhubhisa esinye izikhathi eziningi - futhi yilokho okwagcina ukuthula.

blocks.text: I-USA yasebenzisa amabhomu e-athomu ngo-1945; i-USSR yahlola elayo ngo-1949. Zombili zase ziqhudelana ukwakha **izinqolobane zezikhali zenuzi** ezinamandla nakakhulu kanye nemicibisholo yokuzihambisa. Lokhu kwazala umqondo obuhlungu **wokuBhubhisana Okuqinisekisiwe (Mutually Assured Destruction, MAD)**: ngoba nhlangothi ngalunye lwalungabhubhisa olunye ngokuziphindiselela, alukho olwaba nesibindi sokushaya kuqala.

items: Umqhudelwano wasakazekela emkhathini - isathelayithi ye-USSR i-**Sputnik** (1957) yayethusa i-USA.
**Ukuvimbela ngokwesabisa (deterrence)** kwakusho ukuthi ukuphepha kwakuncike esongelweni lokubhujiswa okuphelele.
Ingozi yesehlakalo esingahlosiwe noma yephutha lokubala kwenza yonke inkinga yesabeke.

image.alt: Isikali sokulinganisa esinomcibisholo ohlangothini ngalunye, kulinganiselwe ngokulinganayo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='116' y='40' width='8' height='90' fill='#3a3a3a'/><rect x='96' y='130' width='48' height='10' fill='#3a3a3a'/><rect x='50' y='48' width='140' height='6' fill='#3a3a3a'/><g fill='#2f4b7a'><path d='M56 96 l8 -34 l8 34 Z'/><rect x='60' y='96' width='8' height='10'/></g><g fill='#8a1f1f'><path d='M168 96 l8 -34 l8 34 Z'/><rect x='172' y='96' width='8' height='10'/></g><line x1='120' y1='54' x2='64' y2='62' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='120' y1='54' x2='176' y2='62' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuphambana okusenkabeni yeMpi Yomqando: izikhali ezayenza yaba yingozi kakhulu futhi zaziyizona, ngokuvimbela ngokwesabisa (deterrence), ezavimba impi 'eshisayo' eqondile phakathi kwezikhulu zamandla. Ethula i-MAD nokuvimbela ngokwesabisa ngokucophelela - le miqondo iyahlolwa. Qaphela izindleko ezibanzi: izindleko ezinkulu zezempi, ukwesaba komphakathi, kanye nokukhula kwezinhlangano ezilwa nenuzi.

slides.heading: Inkinga Yemicibisholo YaseCuba
slides.lead: Izinsuku eziyishumi nantathu umhlaba wasondela empini yenuzi ukwedlula nanini ngaphambili.

blocks.text: Lapho i-USSR ibeka ngasese **imicibisholo yenuzi eCuba**, eduze nogu lwase-US, uMongameli **Kennedy** wayala ukuvinjezelwa ngemikhumbi yempi wafuna ukuba isuswe. Ngemva kokubhekana okushubile, umholi weSoviet **Khrushchev** wavuma ukususa imicibisholo; ngokushintshana i-USA yathembisa ngasese ukususa imicibisholo yayo eTurkey nokungayihlaseli iCuba.

items: Kwaba yilapho iMpi Yomqando yasondela khona kakhulu engxabanweni yenuzi eqondile.
Inkinga yakhombisa kokubili ingozi yokudlalela onqenqemeni lwengozi (brinkmanship) kanye nokubaluleka kobunxusi bangasese.
Emva kwalokho ucingo 'oluqondile (hotline)' lwaxhuma iWashington neMoscow ukunciphisa ingozi yempi engahlosiwe.

image.alt: Ubuso bewashi bukhombisa imizuzu embalwa ngaphambi kwaphakathi kwamabili, obufanekisela ukusondela kwenhlekelele.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='80' r='56' fill='#fff' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='100' cy='80' r='5' fill='#8a1f1f'/><line x1='100' y1='80' x2='100' y2='40' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='100' y1='80' x2='120' y2='58' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' stroke-linecap='round'/><g fill='#3a3a3a'><rect x='97' y='30' width='6' height='8'/><rect x='97' y='122' width='6' height='8'/><rect x='150' y='77' width='8' height='6'/><rect x='42' y='77' width='8' height='6'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi yisibonelo esiyisiqubulo seMpi Yomqando sokudlalela onqenqemeni lwengozi (brinkmanship). Hambisa abafundi kuyo imbangela (imicibisholo yeSoviet eCuba, ngokwayo eyimpendulo yemicibisholo yase-US eTurkey nokuhlasela okwehlulekile kweBay of Pigs), inkinga (ukuvinjezelwa nesixwayiso sokugcina), kanye nesixazululo (isivumelwano sasese). Gcizelela ukuthi 'ukunqoba' komphakathi kukaKennedy kwafihla ukuvumelana kokubili - isibonelo esihle sokuthi kungani sihlola inguqulo esemthethweni yezehlakalo.

slides.heading: Ukulwa ngamanye amazwe
slides.lead: Zingakwazi ukulwa ngokuqondile, izikhulu zamandla zasekela izinhlangothi eziphikisanayo ezimpini emhlabeni wonke.

columns.text: INyakatho yeKorea yobukhomanisi, esekelwe yi-USSR neChina, yahlasela iNingizimu eyayisekelwa yi-US. Ibutho leNhlangano Yezizwe (UN) langenela. Impi yaphela ngokungenamphumela eduze nomngcele wokuqala, ishiya iKorea ihlukanisiwe kuze kube namuhla.

I-USA yalwa impi ende, ebiza kakhulu, ukuvimba iNyakatho yeVietnam yobukhomanisi ukuba ithathe iNingizimu. Naphezu kwamandla amakhulu yahoxa ngo-1973, futhi iVietnam yahlanganiswa kabusha ngaphansi kobukhomanisi ngo-1975 - isehluleko esikhulu sokuvimba ukwanda (containment).

slides.notes: Chaza 'impi eyenziwa ngabanye (proxy war)' ngokucacile: izikhulu zamandla zanikeza izikhali, imali kanye nabeluleki kubangane bendawo esikhundleni sokulwa zodwa. Qaphela ukuthi lezi zimpi zazicekela phansi amazwe athintekayo. IVietnam ikakhulukazi yalimaza ukuzethemba nedumela lase-US. Bonisa islayidi esilandelayo ngokuqaphela ukuthi izingxabano eziningi ezenziwa ngabanye zenzeka 'eZweni Lesithathu (Third World)' elalisanda kuzuza inkululeko, kubandakanya iNingizimu ye-Afrika (i-Angola), abafundi abayifundayo ezihlokweni zakamuva.

slides.heading: Izikhulu zamandla, amaqembu kanye nabangahlangene nohlangothi
slides.lead: Umhlaba wonke wadonselwa emzabalazweni onezinhlangothi ezimbili - kodwa akuzona zonke izizwe ezazifuna ukukhetha uhlangothi.

blocks.text: IMpi Yomqando yakha **uhlelo lwezinhlangothi ezimbili (bipolar order)** lapho iningi lamazwe lalihlangene neWashington noma iMoscow. Njengoba imibuso yaseYurophu yawohloka ngemva kuka-1945, zombili izikhulu zamandla zaqhudelana ngethonya ezizweni ezazisanda kuzuza inkululeko kulo lonke i-Afrika ne-Asia, ngokuvamile ngosizo, ukuhwebelana kanye nokweseka ohulumeni abangabangane.

items: I-**Non-Aligned Movement** (eyasungulwa ngo-1961) yavumela amazwe anjenge-India, i-Egypt neYugoslavia ukuba enqabe ukujoyina noma yiliphi iqembu.
I-**Bandung Conference** yango-1955 yayivele isivezile lesi sifiso sokuzimela ezikhulwini zamandla.
INingizimu ye-Afrika, kubandakanya impi e-Angola, yadonselwa kulo mqhudelwano womhlaba wonke - okuxhumana nezihloko zeBanga 12 zakamuva.

image.alt: Izindingiliza ezimbili ezinkulu zidonsela izindingiliza ezincane kuzo, ezinye izindingiliza ezincane zisala phakathi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 160' role='img'><rect width='260' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='46' cy='80' r='30' fill='#2f4b7a'/><circle cx='214' cy='80' r='30' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#7a8b5a'><circle cx='96' cy='54' r='9'/><circle cx='92' cy='104' r='9'/><circle cx='164' cy='50' r='9'/><circle cx='168' cy='108' r='9'/></g><g fill='#8a8f96'><circle cx='130' cy='72' r='10'/><circle cx='128' cy='104' r='8'/><circle cx='136' cy='40' r='7'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuthi ukuqedwa kobukoloni neMpi Yomqando kwakugxumana: izizwe ezazisanda kukhululeka zaba yinkundla yempi yethonya lezikhulu zamandla. I-Non-Aligned Movement ibalulekile kubafundi baseNingizimu Afrika ngoba isimo se-Afrika ezimele, kanye kamuva nezivumelwano zamazwe ngamazwe ze-ANC, kuxhumana nalesi sithombe esikhulu. Gcina indlela yokwethula inesibopho: izinhlangano eziningi zenkululeko zazinezimpande zangempela zendawo, hhayi nje ukuxhaswa yiMpi Yomqando.

slides.heading: IMpi Yomqando: esikufundile
slides.lead: Umzabalazo wezinhlangothi ezimbili, wenkolelo-mbono - owalwa ngezinkinga, izimpi ezenziwa ngabanye kanye nomqhudelwano wezikhali - owabumba umhlaba ngaphandle kwempi eqondile phakathi kwezikhulu zamandla.

blocks.text: Kusukela ekuphuphumeni kobungane bempi ngo-1945 kuya ekuwohlokeni kwe-USSR ngo-1991, iMpi Yomqando yahlukanisa umhlaba phakathi kwezikhulu ezimbili zamandla nezinkolelo-mbono ezimbili. Yayi 'nqotshwa' hhayi enkundleni yempi kodwa ngengcindezi yezomnotho, ushintsho lwezombusazwe kanye nokuwa ekugcineni kobukhomanisi eYurophu - okukhunjulwa kakhulu ekuweni koDonga LwaseBerlin ngo-1989.

blocks.question: Chaza ukuthi kungani ubungane bempi phakathi kwe-USA ne-USSR baphela ngemva kuka-1945. Bhekisela kokubili enkolelweni-mbono nasekukhathazekeni ngokuphepha.
'Umqhudelwano wezikhali zenuzi wenza iMpi Yomqando yaba yingozi kakhulu futhi yazinza kakhulu.' Xoxa ngalesi sitatimende.

Usebenzisa Inkinga Yemicibisholo YaseCuba NOMA IMpi YaseVietnam njengesibonelo, chaza ukuthi kuchazwani ngokudlalela onqenqemeni lwengozi (brinkmanship) kweMpi Yomqando noma 'impi eyenziwa ngabanye (proxy war)'.

slides.notes: Phetha ngokuhlanganisa imicu ndawonye: imvelaphi, inkolelo-mbono, izinkinga, izimpi ezenziwa ngabanye kanye nohlelo lwezinhlangothi ezimbili. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengokuzilolonga kokubhala okwandisiwe; ukwabiwa kwamamaki kufanekisela izitayela ze-CAPS zesindaba nezisekelwe emithonjeni. Khombisa phambili eSihlokweni 6 (ukuphela kweMpi Yomqando, kusukela ngo-1989 kuqhubeke) nasengxenyeni yaseNingizimu ye-Afrika (i-Angola, umzabalazo wenkululeko). Khumbuza abafundi ukuba bahlole ukwethembeka nokuchema kwemithombo yeMpi Yomqando, njengoba zombili izinhlangothi zakhiqiza inkulumo-ze.
